title: Palantir Technologies Reports Strong Q1 2026 Results
text: Palantir Technologies delivered exceptional first-quarter 2026 results, with total revenues reaching $1.63 billion, representing 85% year-over-year growth. The surge was fueled by increased adoption of artificial intelligence platforms across both commercial and government sectors. U.S. operations led the growth, with revenues jumping 104% to $1.282 billion. Commercial revenues in the U.S. climbed 133% to $595 million, while government revenues increased 84% to $687 million. The company closed 206 deals valued at $1 million or more during the quarter. The company demonstrated significant profitability expansion, posting GAAP income from operations of $754 million, representing a 46% operating margin. Net income more than quadrupled to $871 million. Operating cash flow surged to $899 million from $310 million in the prior-year period. Management raised its 2026 outlook, projecting revenues between $7.65-$7.66 billion, implying approximately 71% annual growth. The company also forecasts U.S. commercial revenues exceeding $3.22 billion, representing at least 120% growth. CEO Alex Karp attributed the performance to growing adoption of AI-driven software platforms across enterprise and government operations.
